projects.name: J.O.C.A.S.T.A.
projects.oneLiner: Intelligent AI-powered schedule assistant with travel optimization
projects.essence: J.O.C.A.S.T.A. (Just Organized Calendar And Schedule Travel Assistant) is an intelligent scheduling application that combines AI planning, weather awareness, and travel time optimization. It helps users manage their daily schedules with smart buffer times, multi-modal transport calculations, and seamless calendar integration.

frontend.name: Expo / React Native
frontend.notes: Cross-platform mobile and web with expo-router

backend.name: Node.js / NestJS
backend.notes: Modular architecture with separate modules for auth, events, planner, etc.

instructions.localSetupMd:
## Local Setup

### Client (Mobile/Web)
```bash
cd apps/client
npm install
npx expo start
```

### Server
```bash
cd apps/server
npm install
npm run start:dev
```
instructions.deployMd:
## Deployment

TBD - Not yet configured for production deployment.
instructions.runbookMd:
## Runbook

### Common Issues
- Metro cache issues: `rm -rf node_modules/.cache .expo && npx expo start --clear`
- Port conflicts: `pkill -f "expo start"`
instructions.knownIssuesMd:
## Known Issues

- Demo mode only (no live backend integration yet)
- Weather data is static demo data

documentation.envVarsTemplate:
# Client
EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=

# Server
DATABASE_URL=
JWT_SECRET=
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=
documentation.databaseSchema:
## Core Entities

- Users
- Events (appointments, meetings, workouts, etc.)
- Locations
- Tasks
- Notifications
documentation.apiEndpoints:
## Server Modules

- /auth - Authentication
- /users - User management
- /events - Calendar events
- /tasks - Task management
- /locations - Location data
- /planner - AI planning
- /notifications - Push notifications
- /integrations/google - Google Calendar sync
- /integrations/telegram - Telegram bot
- /integrations/directions - Travel directions
- /integrations/weather - Weather data
documentation.changelog:
## Development

- Monochrome tab icons with dynamic Today date
- Theme switching (light/dark)
- Editable buffer times and constraints
- Transport mode selection (sedan, motorcycle, taxi, transit)
- Taxi provider integration (Uber, Checker)
- Weather alerts with travel impact

portfolio.challenge: Managing a busy schedule with multiple appointments, travel between locations, and varying transport modes while accounting for weather conditions and personal constraints.
portfolio.solution: An intelligent assistant that automatically calculates travel times, suggests optimal departure times, manages buffer periods between events, and adapts to user preferences for transport modes and schedule constraints.

core: Multi-modal travel time calculation (sedan, motorcycle, taxi, transit)
Configurable buffer times per event type
Schedule constraints (sleep, work hours, quiet hours)
Quick event creation with natural language
ui: Dynamic Today icon with current date
